examples: Devils don't slosh around much of a Sunday, I don't reckon.
The main effect is to raise the fundamental slosh mode frequency.
The raucous cursing of the crewmen, the slosh of water, the cries of sea birds, were the only sounds .
Why do hospitals let doctors, orderlies and visitors slosh bacteria around with every footstep?
It was hard to tell sometimes which one might slosh out of the pot and stick.
